name: The Principalities route hardening 1
transition_feel: The Principalities route hardening 1 reveals The Principalities through patrol logic, trust rules, and movement friction.
handoff_custom: Declare purpose, destination, and patronage before suspicion matures.
paperwork_and_permission_model: Paper helps, but clear sponsorship and coherent cargo matter just as much.
patrol_rhythm: Routine in daylight, selective and sharper after dark.
after_dark_change: Informal power becomes more important than posted procedure after sunset.
